word: G2579 - κἄν - kán - kan - And if

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κἄν

- Transliteration: Kan

- Phonetic: kan

- Definition:

1. and if

2. also or even if

a. of only, at least

b. even if

- Origin: from G2532 and G1437

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From G2532 nad G1437; and (or even) if: - and (also) if (so much as) if but at the least though yet.
